gold.title: Expandable Chat
gold.reason: Floating chat widget that expands from a button with position variants (bottom-right/left) — the go-to component for showcasing an AI assistant embedded in any SaaS product page.

gold.title: Gradient AI Chat Input
gold.reason: Framer Motion animated gradient border, image attachment, model selector dropdown, and theme support — visually striking and immediately conveys a premium AI product.

gold.title: Placeholders And Vanish Input
gold.reason: Animated placeholder cycling with canvas-based vanish-on-submit effect — a signature Aceternity animation that is instantly eye-catching and memorable on an AI product landing page.

gold.title: AI Assistant Interface
gold.reason: Full-screen assistant layout with animated suggestion chips, mic toggle, file/code/book action buttons, and Framer Motion transitions — a complete, high-fidelity AI product hero showcase.

gold.title: Multimodal AI Chat Input
gold.reason: Production-grade multimodal input with file previews, CVA variants, AnimatePresence, memo optimisation, and fast-deep-equal — the most technically sophisticated input component in the set.

gold.title: Animated AI Chat
gold.reason: Full animated chat interface with file upload, Figma import, screen share icons, and useTransition — a feature-rich demo that communicates a modern AI coding or design tool.

gold.title: Bolt Style Chat
gold.reason: Bolt.new-inspired chat with model selector (GPT/Claude/Gemini badges), attachment options, and prompt toolbar — high visual recognition for developer-tool and AI-product audiences.

gold.title: AI Prompt Box
gold.reason: Radix Dialog + Tooltip integrated prompt box with mic, globe, brain, and folder-code action buttons plus animated stop/send toggle — a fully-featured, polished AI prompt widget.

gold.title: Animated AI Input
gold.reason: Bot avatar, model selector ChevronDown, file attachment, and animated suggestion reveal — clean premium aesthetic that works well in a hero or feature section.

gold.title: Glowing AI Chat Assistant
gold.reason: Floating glowing chat widget with file/link/code attach modes and a distinctive neon glow effect — immediately eye-catching for an AI SaaS landing page.

gold.title: Claude Style Chat Input
gold.reason: Claude-faithful input with plus menu, model badge selector, animated file attachment chips, and loading state — a recognisable premium UI that signals product maturity.

gold.title: Claude Style AI Input
gold.reason: Claude-style input with comprehensive attachment support (image, video, audio, archive), filter sliders, and animated type chips — very feature-complete and visually credible for AI demos.

gold.title: IA Siri Chat
gold.reason: Voice-first interface with animated visualiser bars, mic/mute toggle, and volume controls using Framer Motion — a rare and striking voice-AI showcase component.

gold.title: AI Voice Input
gold.reason: Animated waveform visualiser bars that respond to recording state with timing-based animation — a compact, premium micro-interaction ideal for AI voice product feature sections.

gold.title: AI Chat
gold.reason: Framer Motion-animated chat bubbles with streaming-style AI/user message distinction and send button — a clean, complete conversational UI suitable for AI product landing pages.

gold.title: Chat Interface
gold.reason: Full animated chat interface using motion/react with link attachment, message history, and ref-based scroll — a polished end-to-end conversation UI.

gold.title: AI Input
gold.reason: Animated orb/blob with motion/react plus multi-variant button system — visually distinctive brand element that doubles as a prompt input for AI product pages.

silver.title: Chat Bubble
silver.reason: Well-structured avatar + message bubble with action buttons and loading state — a solid building block for assembling full chat UIs.

silver.title: Chat Message List
silver.reason: Auto-scroll message container with a scroll-to-bottom button — an essential chat UX primitive, cleanly implemented.

silver.title: Chat Input
silver.reason: Auto-resizing textarea with clean forwardRef API — functional and composable but lacks visual distinctiveness.

silver.title: Prompt Input
silver.reason: Context-based composable prompt input with loading state and tooltip integration — solid API design and clean, though low on visual flair.

silver.title: Response Stream
silver.reason: Typewriter and fade stream modes for async text — a genuinely useful AI response rendering primitive; functional but purely a utility hook/component.

silver.title: Text Shimmer Wave
silver.reason: Per-character Framer Motion wave animation with 3D z/x/y distance controls — a premium loading text effect ideal for AI response states.

silver.title: AI Input With Suggestions
silver.reason: Inline suggestion chips (Summarise, Fix Grammar, etc.) with icon-tagged options — a practical prompt-helper pattern seen in leading AI tools.

silver.title: AI Input With Search
silver.reason: Globe web-search toggle with AnimatePresence attachment preview — adds a Perplexity-style search mode to a standard prompt input.

silver.title: AI Input With File
silver.reason: File attachment with preview chips and dismiss — a common but well-executed multimodal pattern; clean without being visually memorable.

silver.title: AI Input With Loading
silver.reason: Animated loading dots and stop-generation button — useful loading state management for AI inputs; functional utility tier.

silver.title: AI Input
silver.reason: Minimal auto-resize textarea with mic and send icons — a clean baseline AI input; reliable but not distinctive enough for Gold.

silver.title: Ruixen Moon Chat
silver.reason: Feature-rich chat input with image, file, and mode toggles in a dark-themed card — polished component with good feature coverage.

silver.title: Ruixen Prompt Box
silver.reason: Sparkles badge and verified-brand label alongside auto-resize textarea — a branded prompt box with a clean layout, slightly generic aesthetic.

silver.title: Ruixen Query Box
silver.reason: Mic, upload, and send in a minimal auto-resize box — functional and clean, useful as a lightweight AI prompt widget.

silver.title: Minimal Chat Box
silver.reason: Spring-animated expand/collapse from icon using MotionConfig — a tasteful micro-interaction; minimal scope limits its landing-page impact.

silver.title: Advanced AI Chat Input
silver.reason: Composable CVA-based chat input with Button/Textarea sub-components and ButtonProps passthrough — well-architected library-grade primitive.

silver.title: AI Chat Input (ruixen)
silver.reason: Badge-tagged context chips with popover model selector and animated textarea — good feature coverage in a compact layout.

silver.title: AI Actions
silver.reason: Copy/Refresh/Share/Thumbs actions bar with conversation message wrapper — a clean post-response action strip useful in any chat UI.

silver.title: Agent Plan
silver.reason: Animated subtask plan tracker with CheckCircle/CircleDotDashed status icons and LayoutGroup — useful for showcasing AI agent step-execution UX.

silver.title: Animated Text
silver.reason: Character-cursor streaming text hook using framer-motion animate — a solid streaming text utility but purely a hook with no visual component.

silver.title: Animated Loading SVG Text Shimmer
silver.reason: SVG-based shimmer loader with ChevronRight and cn utility — a polished AI-thinking loading indicator suited to chat response states.

silver.title: Auto Resizing AI Input
silver.reason: Auto-resize textarea with globe, paperclip, plus, sparkles, and AnimatePresence dismiss for attachments — well-rounded feature set in a clean layout.

silver.title: AI Chat Input (preetsuthar17)
silver.reason: Animated placeholder rotation (motion/react), mic, globe, paperclip toolbar — smooth and functional; solid silver-tier chat input.

silver.title: File Upload And Chat
silver.reason: Full dark/light theme toggle, multi-file type icons, and bot/user distinction — a complete self-contained chat + upload app; slightly heavy for embedding but useful as a demo.

bronze.title: AI Assistant Card
bronze.reason: A card with model selector and capability badges — more of a settings/info card than a functional chat component; limited redesign utility.

bronze.title: AI Loader
bronze.reason: Rotating letter-ring loader with a hardcoded dark gradient background — a loading spinner, not a chat component; very niche use case.

bronze.title: Loader (ibelick)
bronze.reason: Multi-variant loading spinner library (circular, dots, wave, terminal, etc.) — a pure utility loader, not specific to AI chat; mismatched category.

bronze.title: Loader (aghasisahakyan1)
bronze.reason: Identical multi-variant spinner component to ibelick__loader — duplicate utility; no visual distinctiveness for landing page use.

bronze.title: Prompt Suggestion
bronze.reason: A single button styled as a suggestion chip — extremely minimal; a building block fragment, not a usable showcase component.

bronze.title: Message Loading
bronze.reason: An SVG three-dot typing indicator — a micro-utility component with a single animated SVG; useful internally but not standalone-ready.

bronze.title: Chat Input (Alwurts)
bronze.reason: Context-based composable textarea with auto-resize hook — a clean utility primitive but minimal and without visual differentiation.

bronze.title: AI Chat Input (baozhouqi)
bronze.reason: CVA-based button system with paperclip and ArrowUp — structurally sound but bare, essentially a component library primitive.

bronze.title: AI Assistant (coderislive07)
bronze.reason: Basic message array state machine with send and typing indicator — a tutorial-level chat implementation without visual polish.

bronze.title: Canvas Effect
bronze.reason: React Three Fiber canvas reveal effect — a visual effect primitive that is a background decoration, not a chat UI component.

bronze.title: JSX Preview
bronze.reason: A react-jsx-parser wrapper for rendering dynamic JSX strings — a dev-tool utility specific to AI code generation workflows; too niche for general redesigns.

bronze.title: Slider
bronze.reason: A Radix Slider with tooltip — a generic form input misplaced in the ai-chats category; no AI chat relevance.

bronze.title: Command Palette
bronze.reason: A full command-k palette with theme switching and search — a useful app utility but not an AI chat component; wrong category fit for redesign work.

bronze.title: Ruixen Mono Chat
bronze.reason: WhatsApp-style messaging UI with emoji, double-tick read receipts, and group avatars — a consumer messaging component, not an AI product chat; limited SaaS redesign value.

bronze.title: Creative Card
bronze.reason: An image/chart/send icon card prompt — more of a mood-board card than a functional AI input; narrow use case.

bronze.title: Slide Tabs
bronze.reason: A motion-animated tab bar — a general navigation component with no AI chat relation; misclassified in this category.

bronze.title: Prompt Input Dynamic Grow
bronze.reason: Uses Figma React API (defineProperties) — incompatible with standard React web projects; only usable inside Figma plugins.
